name: EnGenAI Skills Marketplace
description: Vetted, open-source skills for AI agents built on EnGenAI

skills.name: agent-platform-context
skills.description: EnGenAI agent platform internals — AgentExecutor, mailbox messaging, lead/worker team model, working memory, Celery task infrastructure, and the full execution lifecycle. Reference for platform and agent-aware code.
skills.author: engenai

skills.name: backend-context
skills.description: EnGenAI backend conventions — FastAPI patterns, service layer, async DB access, authentication, middleware, and security patterns. Reference for Sophi and any agent working in src/backend/.
skills.author: engenai

skills.name: frontend-context
skills.description: EnGenAI frontend conventions — Next.js 14 App Router patterns, React Flow canvas, Tailwind CSS, Zustand state management, TypeScript strict mode, and component conventions. Reference for Marv and frontend agents.
skills.author: engenai

skills.name: infrastructure-context
skills.description: EnGenAI infrastructure conventions — GCP GKE, ArgoCD GitOps, Terraform, Helm, CI/CD pipeline, K8s deployment patterns, and security hardening requirements. Reference for DevOps and infrastructure agents.
skills.author: engenai

skills.name: sprint-context
skills.description: EnGenAI sprint workflow — 3-file pattern, TASK_STATUS protocol, definition of done, sprint opening/closing process, and quality gates. Reference for all agents contributing to sprint delivery.
skills.author: engenai

skills.name: workspace-context
skills.description: EnGenAI platform workspace overview — project identity, tech stack, team structure, terminology, and development principles. Read-only reference for all agents operating in the EnGenAI codebase.
skills.author: engenai

skills.name: code-review
skills.description: Two-stage code review process for EnGenAI. Stage 1 checks spec compliance, Stage 2 checks code quality. Stage 2 cannot begin until Stage 1 passes. Based on the Superpowers research pattern.
skills.author: engenai

skills.name: tdd-workflow
skills.description: Test-Driven Development workflow for EnGenAI backend and frontend code. Write failing tests first, then implement, then verify with evidence. Never claim "done" without running the verification command.
skills.author: engenai

skills.name: deploy-to-dev
skills.description: Deploy to dev.engenai.app via GitOps CI/CD pipeline. Push to sprint branch triggers GitHub Actions → builds images → updates gitops/dev → ArgoCD syncs. Never push directly to develop or gitops branches.
skills.author: engenai

skills.name: sprint-closing
skills.description: Close an EnGenAI sprint with the mandatory 6-phase process. Every sprint must be fully documented and Amad must give explicit approval before any closure docs are committed and pushed.
skills.author: engenai

skills.name: security-context
skills.description: EnGenAI security model — OWASP Top 10 checklist, secure coding rules, the Lethal Trifecta threat model, forbidden patterns, and required security controls for all agents and skills. Mandatory reference for security reviews.
skills.author: engenai
